title: Golden Ticket: RC4 Encrypted TGT Request
description: Detects Kerberos TGT requests (4768) or renewals (4770) using RC4 encryption. Golden tickets forged with krbtgt hash use RC4; modern AD defaults to AES256.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Event ID' = 4768 or 'Event ID' = 4770) and TicketEncryptionType = '0x17'))
